name: Amur Table Lamp W/ USB Port - 24 Inch Height - TBL4456 - Black/Brass - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the AMUR 24 inch table lamp in a striking black and brass finish. Crafted from robust iron, this lamp features a sleek design that effortlessly complements any interior decor. The captivating combination of black and brass adds an aesthetic appeal that will enhance your home or office environment.

This versatile table lamp not only serves as a stylish piece but also provides practicality with its integrated USB port. Easily charge your devices while enjoying the warm and inviting glow it emits. The modern design and functional features make it a perfect addition to your bedside, desk, or living area.

Upgrade your lighting solution with the AMUR lamp, where style meets functionality. Its sturdy iron construction ensures it will be a dependable fixture in your space. Transform the ambiance of your room and enjoy the blend of style and convenience it offers. This lamp is more than just lighting; it is a statement piece that adds character to your space.
